title: LS2 LS2 FF396 Raptor TC-2

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer (CFRP) Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF396 Raptor TC-2 utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to optimize energy absorption during impact events while maintaining structural integrity. The shell construction employs a carbon fiber reinforced polymer composite, significantly reducing overall mass without compromising the rigidity required for high-speed stability and crash protection. This material choice allows for a more aerodynamic profile compared to traditional ABS shells, reducing drag at highway velocities.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of cutting-edge technology and uncompromising safety with the LS2 FF396 Raptor TC-2. Designed for the modern rider who demands performance without sacrificing style, this helmet features a sleek, aggressive aesthetic that turns heads on every ride. The advanced carbon fiber shell not only makes it one of the lightest in its class but also ensures superior protection against road debris and impact forces.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF396 Raptor TC-2 full-face helmet. Features ECE 22.06 certification, lightweight carbon fiber shell, and optimized aerodynamics for serious riders.
